verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy words long preserved For our walk in this world They resound with God's own heart Oh, let the words of God impart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Words of Life, words of Hope Give us strength, help us cope In this world, where e'er we roam The word of God will guide us home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Words of God ever true Changing me and changing you We have come with open hearts Oh, let the Words of God impart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy words of our Faith Handed down to this age Came to us through sacrifice Oh heed the faithful words of Christ

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy words long preserved For our walk in this world They resound with God's own heart Oh let the ancient words impart
